member.summary: Extensions for JSON

member.summary: Set the serializer settings the way we expect them to behave in Nexus Link. Typically chain this to

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender
member.summary: Convenience client for making REST calls

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.NexusLinkHandlerOptions
member.summary: The options for the for this . The constructor will initialize it according to SetNexusLinkDefaults().

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.HttpClient
member.summary: This is the that is used for all HTTP calls. It is always initialized to a new HttpClient with as handler. That handler has as options.
member.remarks: You can modify its behavior by modifying the or replace this HTTP client entirely with your own HTTP client. If you replace it, will be set to null.

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.Credentials
member.summary: Credentials that are used when sending requests to the service.

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.SerializationSettings
member.summary: Json settings when serializing to strings

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.DeserializationSettings
member.summary: Json settings when de-serializing from strings

member.name: M:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Rest.ServiceClientCredentials)
member.param: The base URL that all HTTP calls methods will refer to.
The credentials used when making the HTTP calls.

member.name: M:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.NexusHttpSender.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,Microsoft.Rest.ServiceClientCredentials)
member.param: The base URL that all HTTP calls methods will refer to.
The credentials used when making the HTTP calls.

member.summary: The new http sender will share the same and the same .

member.summary: This handler contains all the Nexus Link handlers.

member.summary: This handler contains all the Nexus Link handlers.

member.name: M:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.NexusLinkHandler.TestSendAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.CustomSendDelegateOptions.SendAsyncMethod,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: This is for testing this class. It temporarily sets the to and executes .

member.name: M:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.NexusLinkHandler.SendAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a Fulcrum ForwardCorrelationId to the requests before sending it.

member.name: M:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.NexusLinkHandler.MaybeRerouteAsynchronousRequestsAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: If the request is in an asynchronous context, the request will be sent over an .
member.exception: Thrown after the request has been sent for asynchronous handling and when a response is not available.

member.summary: Options that controls

member.summary: The features that can be controlled.

member.summary: Set the default values as recommended by Nexus Link

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.CustomSendDelegateOptions
member.summary: Use a custom send delegate instead of the default one. This comes handy for testing.

member.summary: The delegate type for the send async method.

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.CustomSendDelegateOptions.SendAsyncDelegate
member.summary: The custom delegate to use instead of the next HTTP SendAsync method.

member.summary: Base class for features

member.summary: Set this to true if you want to enable the feature

member.summary: Forward header .

member.summary: Forward header .

member.summary: Forward header .

member.summary: Forward headers and and save information about the call.

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.HandlerFeatures.LogRequestAndResponse
member.summary: Logs the request and the response

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.HandlerFeatures.RerouteAsynchronousRequests
member.summary: Logs the request and the response

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.HandlerFeatures.CustomSendDelegate
member.summary: Use a custom send delegate instead of the default one. This comes handy for testing.

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.HandlerFeatures.ThrowFulcrumExceptionOnFail
member.summary: Any non-successful response will be thrown as a .

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.LogRequestAndResponseOptions
member.summary: Logs the request and the response

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.RerouteAsynchronousRequestsOptions
member.summary: Forward header

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.RerouteAsynchronousRequestsOptions.AsyncRequestMgmtCapability
member.summary: The async request management capability that can take care of asynchronous requests.

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions
member.summary: Forward header

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.SaveBeforeExecutionAsyncMethod
member.summary: A delegate to save information about a request execution before the actual execution

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.SaveAfterExecutionAsyncMethod
member.summary: A delegate to save information about a request execution after the actual execution

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.SaveBeforeExecutionAsyncDelegate
member.summary: The method that will deal with the actual saving

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.SaveAfterExecutionAsyncDelegate
member.summary: The method that will deal with the actual saving

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.BeforeExecution
member.summary: Information about a request execution before the actual execution

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.BeforeExecution.ExecutionId
member.summary: The current execution id

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.BeforeExecution.ParentExecutionId
member.summary: The execution id that created this , i.e. the parent of the execution id

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.BeforeExecution.RequestDescription
member.summary: A summary of the request. For a REST request, this could be the HTTP Method and an anonymous version of the URL.

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum
member.summary: The different result types of a execution

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum.Accepted
member.summary: The request has been accepted. No information yet on success/fail

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum.Success
member.summary: The request has completed and was successful.

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum.Failure
member.summary: The request execution has completed and failed. We can't say whether it is a temporary failure or not.

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum.TemporaryFailure
member.summary: The request execution has completed and failed. This is a temporary failure, i.e the execution can be retried.

member.name: F:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.ExecutionResultEnum.PermanentFailure
member.summary: The request execution has completed and failed. This is a permanent failure, i.e. no use in retrying, unless you change the request somehow.

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.AfterExecution
member.summary: Information about a request execution before the actual execution

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.AfterExecution.ExecutionId
member.summary: The current execution id

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.AfterExecution.Result
member.summary: The result for this execution

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.AfterExecution.ResponseDescription
member.summary: A summary of the response. For a REST request, this could be the HTTP status code and description, e.g. "200 OK".

member.name: P:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.SaveExecutionInformationOptions.AfterExecution.Elapsed
member.summary: The time span for executing the request.

member.name: T:Nexus.Link.Misc.Web.Sdk.OutboundHandlers.Options.ThrowFulcrumExceptionOnFailOptions
member.summary: Forward header
